title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Ashura Doji, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Momonosuke, Kinemon, Oden as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have too help me, many Ashura! Pursuers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: nothing to fear, I'll send you away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to fall, it's high, I'm afraid, I'm going to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The 'Kozuki' name will die with you

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your father is famous... and one day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The one that will rule this country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A dream that his parents or someone forced to say,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not his own dream. What a immature kid..

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: That pathetic brat is oden's son..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I need to tell you something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please hold on a little bit!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
